generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T BERBERINUM. Alkaloid, derived from the roots of Berberis vulg. and Columbo (Cocculus palmatus); C 21 H 19 NO 5 . Preparation , Trituration. Authority. Herberger, Buchner's Repert. f. d. Pharm. (from Wibmer); took four grains in the morning. STOMACH AND ABDOMEN. ► Eructations. ► Cuttings and rumblings in abdomen. STOOL AND ANUS. ► Painless desire for stool. ► Copious fluid stool, with pains in abdomen. ► Thin evacuation, without pain. GENERALITIES. ► Weak, sick feeling. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main
